title: Global install/ownership backend + lockfile + skills→~/.claude/skills + adopt

tests.summary: 9 passed — green-field install + sha256 lock, exact uninstall, never-clobber refusal, brown-field adopt, drift-skip, drift detect, idempotent reinstall, real deployed_files resolver

e2e.summary: tests/e2e/armory-install.spec.ts passes vs sandbox — green-field install, brown-field adopt, uninstall

designAudit.notes: install section sits cleanly atop the existing Armory grid

video.note: sandbox-safe Playwright flow recording + vision-checked screenshot; NOT a walkthrough-skill vision-verified video

notes: Resolver uses APM's authoritative apm.lock.yaml deployed_files (commands<-.apm/prompts, rules<-.apm/instructions are APM-internal mappings, not a clean mirror — verified, so deployed_files is the source of truth; .apm/skills is a skills-only fallback).
